description:
GOAL: Lower the post-resolve, post-macro-expansion AST into fz-IR (CPS canonical form).

## Decisions captured

- IR fns produced in CPS form DIRECTLY. No direct-style intermediate; we never construct direct-style fz-IR.
- Multi-clause dispatch: each clause becomes a continuation choice. Entry block tries pattern 1 -> continuation k1; on fail, tries pattern 2 -> k2; etc.
- Pattern matching desugars to a sequence of conditional continuations.
- Builtins (print, vec_map, assert, assert_eq, etc.) lower to Prim::Builtin(builtin_id, args).
- Interp keeps using Rc<Value> direct-eval. Translation only matters for the JIT/AOT path.
- The ast_value reify/decode (used by macros) lives in src/ast_value.rs and is unchanged.

## Deliverables (new src/ir_lower.rs)

- pub fn lower_program(prog: &Program) -> Result<ir::Module, LowerError>
- Per-Expr-variant lowering.
- Pattern lowering helpers.
- Multi-clause dispatch lowering.
- BuiltinId table (assigned ids; consistent across IR / interp).

## Expressions to handle (all from src/ast.rs Expr)

- Literals (Int / Float / Str / Atom / Bool / Nil) -> Prim::Const.
- Var -> IR Var lookup.
- BinOp / UnOp -> Prim::BinOp / Prim::UnOp.
- Call -> Term::Call (Term::TailCall in tail position).
- If -> Term::If with continuation arms.
- Match (pattern = expr) -> conditional continuation that binds.
- Block -> sequence of stmts.
- Tuple -> Prim::AllocStruct (schema for tuple-of-arity-N).
- List -> Prim::ListCons cascades.
- Map -> Prim::AllocStruct (or dedicated Map prim — see .11.13).
- Bitstring -> dedicated bitstring prims (see .11.12).
- VecLit -> dedicated vec prims (see .11.14).
- Lambda -> reified as a closure struct.
- Case / Cond / With -> CPS-style cascade of conditionals.
- Quote / Unquote -> error at IR translation (should have been handled by macro expansion).

## Patterns

- Wildcard, Var, literals (Int/Float/Str/Atom/Bool/Nil) -> trivial.
- Tuple, List, Map -> projections + recursive matching.
- Bitstring -> bit-extraction primitives.
- As -> bind + recursive.

## Tests

- Lower each fixture in fixtures/; verify shape (snapshot or eval+compare via .11.5 IR interp).

## Risks / research

- Bitstring patterns are non-trivial. Mirror existing matcher logic (eval.rs / bitstr.rs).
- With-form's else-clauses lower to alternate continuation paths.

## Out of scope

- IR interpreter (.11.5) — used to validate THIS translator.
- Cranelift codegen (.11.7+).
title: AST -> fz-IR translator
